question_es: ¿Cuáles son las condiciones activas al entrar al modo MDI/MDA desde un programa interrumpido?
retrieved_evidence_before_if_known: Same quick_ref_mdi_mda_conditions_lookup family and same SPARQL signature were already selected before the fix; the residual was isolated to evaluator-side ES surface matching.
root_cause_confirmed: Evaluator-only bilingual canonicalization gap for the Spanish wording of the MDI/MDA interruption-point answer, not a planner or retrieval regression.
